dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, opportunity does not knock twice. There is a power vacuum and every schemer is circling the empty chair.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Since {quest_origin}, I have spent years building connections and waiting for this moment. But my rivals are moving fast. {target_npc} has already started making promises they cannot deliver. I need {quest_item} found {location_hint} to secure key support before {target_npc} gets to them. The {enemy_type} threat makes this urgent: whoever takes {quest_focus_the} needs to be ready to defend us.
dialogueChunks.outro: Help me claim {quest_stakes_the}, and you will have the ear of the most powerful person in the region. {quest_reward_hint} is only the beginning.

dialogueChunks.intro: Keep your voice down, {player_name}. What I am offering could make us both very wealthy, or very dead.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A discovery was made {location_hint} last week. The {enemy_type_plural} have been spotted near the site, which is the only reason nobody else has moved on it yet. {target_npc} has been sniffing around. If they beat me to the claim, {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} worthless. I need you to clear the {enemy_type_plural} out before they can organize a defense.
dialogueChunks.outro: Fortune favors the bold, not the cautious. {quest_reward_hint} awaits those who move first.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I do not need a hero. I need someone practical who understands that winning is not always clean.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The current leader is corrupt, but everyone loves them because they smile well and give pretty speeches. {target_npc} has proof of their misdeeds hidden {location_hint}, but getting to it means dealing with the {enemy_type_plural} that have overrun the area. I need {quest_item} from those ruins to expose the truth before {quest_time_pressure}.
dialogueChunks.outro: This is not about ambition. It is about replacing someone unworthy with someone who is not afraid to make hard choices. {quest_focus_The} demands action, and {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} hanging in the balance.
